message:
feat(rref): strengthen RRef access safety with witness tokens (bd-27c7l)

Make RRefAccessWitness unforgeable (pub(crate) constructor), add
witness-gated access methods (rref_get_with, rref_with_witness),
implement RRefAccess trait for RegionRecord, and add state-checked
access_witness() that returns Err(RegionClosed) after close.

11 new tests: witness lifecycle, cross-region rejection, stale witness
after close, validate_witness, trait dispatch, error display coverage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
